RugSolScanner
AboutAPI
Monitoring

Real-Time Alerts

Monitor token security conditions 24/7. Get instant notifications when something changes — before it's too late.

What We Monitor

Six critical on-chain signals tracked continuously.

Authority Changes

Instant notification when a token's mint or freeze authority is revoked — or re-enabled.

Liquidity Drops

Alert when a token's liquidity pool drops below a critical threshold or LP is removed.

Large Holder Movements

Track when top holders sell significant portions of their bags or new whales accumulate.

Dev Wallet Activity

Monitor deployer wallet transactions — sells, transfers, and new token deployments.

Score Changes

Get notified when a token's risk score changes significantly — in either direction.

Honeypot Detection

Immediate alert if a previously sellable token becomes a honeypot — critical escape signal.

How It Works

Simple setup, powerful monitoring.

01

Add tokens

Submit the token addresses you want to monitor. No limit on watchlist size.

02

Choose alerts

Select which types of changes matter to you. Configure thresholds.

03

Get notified

Receive instant alerts through Telegram, Discord, email, or webhooks.

Delivery Channels

Choose how you receive notifications.

Telegram

Receive alerts directly in DMs or group chats via our bot.

Discord

Webhook integration for your Discord server channels.

Email

Digest alerts delivered to your inbox — daily or instant.

Webhook

Custom HTTP webhooks for programmatic alert handling.

Free

$0

Forever

  • Up to 5 tokens monitored
  • Telegram alerts
  • Critical alerts only

Pro

$9/mo

Billed monthly

  • Unlimited tokens
  • All channels (TG, Discord, Email, Webhook)
  • All alert types with custom thresholds
  • Priority API access

Start monitoring now

Add our Telegram bot and set up your first alert in under a minute.

Industry-leading Solana token security analysis platform. Real-time on-chain intelligence to protect you from rug pulls, honeypots, and malicious contracts.

Built on Solana

RugSol provides on-chain security analysis for informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. Token scores and risk assessments are algorithmically generated and should not be the sole basis for any investment decision. Always do your own research (DYOR). Past detection performance does not guarantee future results. By using RugSol, you agree to our Terms of Service and acknowledge the inherent risks of cryptocurrency trading.
